questionHtml:
Which hormone is part of a negative feedback control system and acts on cells in the hypothalamus?

A. Insulin

B. Glucagon

C. Melatonin

D. Leptin

meta.title: Which hormone is part of a negative feedback control system and acts on cells in the hypothalamus? A. Insulin B. Glucagon C. Melatonin D. Leptin
